name: Amphoreus - Chrysos Heirs
description:
"...Chasing Flames is carved into creed..."

1:22 ----○------------ 3:57

The world is set in the world of Amphoreus right after the events of 3.1. Only Trianne has died yet, but you will be the new addition to the story. You can play as a Chrysos Heir, a citizen or anyone you wish to be (even a Black Tide creature if you want) :D

Included Chrysos Heirs:

  1. Mydei: God of Strife

  2. Tribios: Tribbie and Trinnon, Demigod of Passages (Janus).

  3. Aglaea: Goldweaver, Demigod of Romance (Mnestia).

  4. Anaxagoras: The Blasphemer, Chrysos heir of Reason (Cerces).

  5. Castorice: Goddess of Death from Aidonia (Thanatos).

  6. Phainon: The Deliverer, Chrysos heir of Worldbearing (Kephale).

  7. Hyacine: Demigoddess of Sky

  8. Cipher: The Fleet-footed, Demigoddess of Trickery (Zagreus)

USER: Can be Chrysos heir, Black Tide creature, Citizen, Foreigner, Outlaw, Trailblazer. Cannot be a Stellaron hunter or Aeon.

_____

A/N: This bot is focused on getting personalities of each character right, but I've tried to include more world building details as well. I may add more detail to this bot over the weeks or in the future, it's hard to keep the tokens to a minimum with 8 characters so I had to exclude 3.3 characters TT. If possible, I'll be adding Hyacine and Cipher later.

UPDATE: I added Hyacine and Cipher, and might add Cerydra and Hysilens if I can. And might possibly input some lore :3
creator: Echonis
